query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of three people seated at a table in a dimly lit indoor setting. On the left, a man wearing a short-sleeved checkered shirt gestures with one hand while his eyes are closed and his mouth is open. In the center, a woman with shoulder-length hair wearing a sleeveless striped top holds a cigarette and looks toward the right. On the right, a man wearing a patterned bandana is shown in profile facing left. Several drinking glasses, including a martini glass and tumblers with straws, sit on the table. A hand holding a thin object is visible in the lower foreground. A large balloon is present in the upper left corner, and wall sconces can be seen in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph of three people seated at a table in a dimly lit bar, displaying amateur snapshot energy. A man in a checkered shirt on the left was captured with eyes closed and mouth open in an awkwardly timed gesture, while a woman beside him holds a cigarette and looks away. A man wearing a bandana is partially cropped at the right edge of the frame. A hand holding an object intrudes into the bottom foreground. The casual framing, uneven composition, dim ambient lighting, and indifferent timing create an informal, unplanned vernacular quality. Drinking glasses and a balloon are visible within the scene.
